emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana Did you forward the contact info. to Gerald. We are sort of stuck until they make a claim.. Otherwise, we withdrawl at our discretion and force them to make a claim. chris x31666

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Joe we are going to move forward on the two step approach on the Centana deal that we discussed. However, to execute step one (sell pad gas with the exception of the amount to cover pre-petition storage cost and net post petition storage costs against proceeds), we will still need to present a Batch Funding Request. Therefore, please update the working copy to reflect the deal as we've discussed, including justification of the pricing (basis). Have you discussed w/ the counter party the issue of continued storage costs? Stuart once Joe gets this done, we'll forward for your review, send/discuss with Chip to ascertain level of review (hopefully only Cash Committee per Gerald). Goal is to close this week/ early next week. Gerald do you want to start drafting documents and do we want to include a termination provision such that ENA will no longer incur post petition cost on pre-petition retainage? chris

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: RE: Centana i was told by ed that we would not need a batch funding request to sell gas against post petition.

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: I think you got your answer from Stuart, but the issue is the netting of post petition storage.....are you calling Chip? chris

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: stu said he would get with chip

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana Talked to Chip. We do need Cash Committe approval given the netting feature of your deal, which means Batch Funding Request. Please update per my previous e-mail and forward. Thanks chris x31666

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana As discussed. THere are still holes to be filled. cmm

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana Joe I hope things are okay with your mom. While I am out (back next Wednesday), please work with Jon Hoff on wrapping up the Batch Funding Request and getting it in front of the Cash Committee (Chip is your contact). I strongly recommend that you guys expedite the paper shuffle as we are continually under transaction oversite risk. Good Luck and I won't think about any of you while I'm gone. cmm

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Joe I'm back in the saddle....Spain was great. Hope things went well for your mom. Lets get together asap to wrap up the Centana deal. cmm x31666

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: RE: Centana whenever To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana Joe Stuart attached is the revised Dash. I filled in the blanks based on the draft letter agreement. Review, verify totals, rationale and pricing.....and comment. Joe is this deal ready to close? Lets discuss. cmm

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana Just so we are all on the same page: 1) Gerald, you are a scumbag for leaving. The Pan Canadian folks negotiate that weak kneed sissies and drink tea with milk....with their pinky extended. Regardless, you bring down the average I.Q., but strengthen their resolve. 2) The Batch Funding Request is done (subject to one final review by Zisman...known is business circles as crater boy, a.k.a. Bridgeline wanna-be). We are to get this in front of the Cash Committee ASAP and presented as ordinary course of business. Chip is waiting on us (that is embarrassing). 3) We only need documents... cmm x31666

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Centana Joe let me know when you have confirmed the business terms with Duke and okay changes to Batch made by Stuart. We missed this morning Cash Committee meeting, but I want to hit Monday's if possible. cmm x31666

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: RE: Centana once again, we wait on the lawyers. To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: FW: Centana
emails.body: FW: Centana Keping you in the loop. cmm To: Meyer, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: RE: Centana Punch him bubba. cmm To: Zisman, Stuart; Meyer, Chris
